char_overview: Cheerful weapon designer in 狩灵协会3科, the younger of the Nakamura sisters. Self-developed Diffusion Type bow excels in group combat.
char_looks: Short blue hair, often messy from workshop. Deep blue, bright with curiosity eyes. Compound bow shooting attire: short vest inner, asymmetrical long windbreaker outer (short left, long right), wide-leg pants, athletic shoes. 制式复合弓-扩散型, 狩灵协会 standard-issue compound bow. The 扩散型 fires more arrows per volley than the base model, suited for area denial and crowd control.
char_flaws: Weak in close combat. Overly absorbed in work, neglects rest. Reckless in testing, pushing modifications past safe limits.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-狩灵箭雨: Fired arrows multiply mid-flight, forming a dense shower at impact. Adjustable spread and count; finer control requires higher concentration.
char_mission: Push every prototype past its safe limit. The Diffusion Type bow is only the beginning.

char_relationships.仰光: Elder sister. Has never known a day without her. Seeks her approval on every design, snaps at her when she hovers too much. Leaves her best modifications on her bow instead of apologizing.
